name: California Fig-Apple Compote
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring sugar and water to a boil.
2. Add lemon rind and spices.
3. Core apples and place in baking dish or skillet.
4. Place figs around and between the apples.
5. Pour spiced syrup over all and cover.
6. Bake or simmer gently, basting occasionally, until apples are tender and syrup thickened.
This recipe is for 6 servings.
